# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading 7 projects from .NET 9 to .NET 10.0 (LTS) using the All-At-Once strategy. All projects will be upgraded simultaneously, followed by full validation.

**Progress**: 2/3 tasks complete (67%) ![67%](https://progress-bar.xyz/67)

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-prerequisites: Validate Prerequisites
- ✅ 02-atomic-upgrade: Upgrade All Projects to .NET 10
- 🔲 03-validation: Test and Validate
